name: Meeting Link Bridge
description: Build or operate a macOS menu-bar bridge that turns the current meeting join link into a clean handoff for notes, chat, email, or a fast open action, with extra weight for Microsoft Teams and browser-based meeting flows.
short_description: A menu-bar handoff bridge that turns the current Teams or browser meeting link into a clean join note, email snippet, or fast open action.
default_prompt: Use $meeting-link-bridge to build a polished macOS menu-bar utility that turns the current Teams or browser meeting link into a clean handoff for notes, chat, email, or a fast join action.
audience: Mac users joining meetings from browser tabs and copied links
Operators who keep pasting join URLs into notes, chat, or email
People working in Teams-heavy workflows without wanting a full calendar client
detail_lines: Detects Teams-first meeting links from the front browser tab, clipboard, or a pasted URL without cloud access.
Turns the raw join URL into a ready-to-paste meeting note, markdown link, or email snippet in one step.
Keeps the pre-meeting handoff short so browser, notes, chat, and Outlook drafts stop competing for the same link.
